age_computation_incorrect: Calculated patient age incorrectly from the birthdate.
duplicate_order_created: Model created duplicate medication or service request orders for the same clinical need.
answer_format_wrong_type: Final answer returned as free‑text string/list when a structured format (specific fields, units, or JSON) was expected.
patient_lookup_failed_missing_result: Model reported "Patient not found" despite the patient existing in the dataset.
answer_submitted_without_fhir_query: Model returned a final answer without performing any FHIR GET request to retrieve required data.
placeholder_minus_one_returned: Model returned a sentinel value "-1" instead of a real measurement or appropriate message.
quantity_unit_mismatch: Returned a numeric value without the required unit or with an incorrect unit.
missing_paired_order_when_no_replacement: Failure to include required paired order (e.g., follow‑up test) when potassium level is not low and no replacement is ordered.
